subcodes.first_line: O Naw-Rúz! Thy name hath been mentioned by the servant in attendance before the Wronged One, and this preserved Tablet hath been sent down unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نوروز قد ذکر اسمک العبد الحاضر لدی المظلوم و نزل لک هذا الکتاب المحفوظ
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
